title: Hub Review, Search & Verification
description: Search hub for relevant skills, verify contributions before solidification, and run LLM-based review on code diffs

actors.name: GEP Evolver
actors.description: The autonomous code evolution engine that initiates hub interactions during the evolution cycle

actors.name: A2A Hub
actors.description: Remote hub server at A2A_HUB_URL; provides skill search, peer review, and solidify-permit endpoints

actors.name: External LLM
actors.description: LLM subprocess (node child process) invoked for automated code review; activated by EVOLVER_LLM_REVIEW=true

use_cases.name: Search Hub for Relevant Skills
use_cases.description: Query A2A Hub for skills relevant to the current evolution context, using either semantic or keyword search
key_behaviors: Checks HUBSEARCH_SEMANTIC env var to choose search mode (semantic vs keyword)
Maintains an in-memory LRU/bounded cache for search results (get/evict/clear)
Sends HTTP requests to hub search endpoint
Returns matched skill entries or empty on offline/failure

use_cases.name: Check Skill Existence on Hub
use_cases.description: Verify whether a specific skill/contribution already exists on the hub before submitting
key_behaviors: Reads A2A_HUB_URL (stripped of trailing slashes)
Queries hub for skill existence check
Returns boolean indicating hub skill presence

use_cases.name: Fetch Hub Review for Contribution
use_cases.description: Fetch peer/community review data from the hub for a given contribution or gene change
key_behaviors: Async call to A2A Hub review endpoint
Parses response for approval/rejection signals
Handles connection errors gracefully

use_cases.name: Request Solidify Permit
use_cases.description: Before solidifying a code mutation, request a permit from the hub to authorize the change
exported_functions: requestSolidifyPermitSync({ geneId, signals, mutation }) → { ok, offline }
key_behaviors: isSolidifyVerifyEnabled: checks A2A_HUB_URL is set AND EVOLVER_SOLIDIFY_VERIFY != 'false' (in test env only)
In production env EVOLVER_SOLIDIFY_VERIFY='false' is ignored (always enabled when hub URL present)
requestSolidifyPermitSync: synchronous HTTP call to hub permit endpoint with geneId/signals/mutation
Returns { ok: false, offline: true } when A2A_HUB_URL is absent
consumeOfflinePermit: consumes a cached offline permit token; returns { ok: false, offline: true } if no token cached

use_cases.name: Run LLM-Based Code Review
use_cases.description: Build a structured review prompt from diff+gene+signals+mutation, then execute an LLM subprocess to get approval/rejection with confidence
exported_functions: buildReviewPrompt({ diff, gene, signals, mutation }) → string
runLlmReview({ diff, gene, signals, mutation }) → { approved, confidence, concerns[], summary }
key_behaviors: isLlmReviewEnabled: checks process.env.EVOLVER_LLM_REVIEW === 'true'
buildReviewPrompt: composes multi-section markdown prompt (gene ID, category, signals list ≤8, rationale ≤500 chars, diff preview ≤6000 chars, 4 review criteria)
runLlmReview: writes prompt to temp file, runs node subprocess via execFileSync, parses JSON response; 30s timeout
Review criteria: (1) addresses signals? (2) regressions/bugs? (3) proportionate blast radius? (4) security concerns?
Response schema: { approved: bool, confidence: 0.0-1.0, concerns: string[], summary: string }
Falls back to { approved: true, confidence: 0.5 } on timeout or parse error
Auto-approves with confidence=0.7 when no external LLM configured

use_cases.name: Build Review Prompt
use_cases.description: Construct a structured LLM prompt from gene metadata and code diff for code review
key_behaviors: Inputs: diff (string), gene (id, category), signals (string[]), mutation (category, rationale)
Truncates diff to 6000 chars, signals to first 8, rationale to 500 chars
Formats as markdown with diff block and review criteria sections

use_case_relationships: UC4 extends UC2 (solidify verification extends hub skill check)
UC1 precedes UC2 (search before checking existence)
UC3 relates UC1 (review fetched after skills found)
key_relationships: solidify.js calls hubVerify.isSolidifyVerifyEnabled + requestSolidifyPermitSync before committing changes
solidify.js calls llmReview.runLlmReview before committing changes
questionGenerator.js consumes llmReviewRejected + llmReviewReason outcome flags
hubReview.js, hubSearch.js, hubVerify.js are all obfuscated; llmReview.js is plain source
All hub modules depend on A2A_HUB_URL env var for hub connectivity
hubSearch.js, hubReview.js listed in selfPR.js OBFUSCATED_FILES set

hubReview.js.role: Hub peer-review fetcher; checks skill existence and fetches community reviews from A2A Hub

hubSearch.js.role: Skill search on A2A Hub; supports semantic and keyword modes with in-memory result cache
hubSearch.js.notable: Contains LRU-style cache with evict/clear; multiple async HTTP calls

hubVerify.js.role: Solidify-permit gating; requests authorization from hub before code mutations are committed

llmReview.js.role: LLM-based automated code reviewer; evaluates diffs against gene signals before solidification

important_notes: hubReview.js, hubSearch.js, hubVerify.js are intentionally obfuscated (listed in selfPR.js OBFUSCATED_FILES)
All hub operations are gated: no A2A_HUB_URL = offline mode with ok:false, offline:true responses
LLM review is opt-in (EVOLVER_LLM_REVIEW env var); auto-approves when not configured
hubVerify solidify-permit enforcement is mandatory in production but can be disabled in test env via EVOLVER_SOLIDIFY_VERIFY=false
These modules are part of the GEP (Genetic Evolution Pipeline) Hub Integration package
Hub endpoint pattern: A2A_HUB_URL/<path> — trailing slashes stripped
